text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking through the shopping
district...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Shhh! Quiet! I'm seriously worried right now!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehehehe. I wonder if you'll guess right.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Which soda did I shake?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe... It's a very dangerous game. Choose the wrong bottle and it'll go pshhh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: PSHAAA!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It'll make a splash like a water park. Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they're playing a game where they
have to guess which one of the sodas has been
shaken.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You only get one chance to decide your fate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Which means, failure is not an option. Not at
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She sounds quite serious, but...
choice_data_list: (...She rather seems to be having fun.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Will you choose well and quench your thirst? Or
will you guess wrong and be doused in a soda
shower?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So which is it, King? Time to choose!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If it were me, I'd go with the one on the right.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to fall for that, Sky! I know you're
trying to trick me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Which one should I choose?
choice_data_list: Seiun Sky said the one on the right is safe.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ha! That's right! So far, we've only heard from
Sky!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're asking me?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I can see the panic on your face,
Special Week!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, answer! Which bottle did you guys shake?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ummm... Well... Uh... ummm!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whistle, whistle. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Nice one, Spe. Assert your right to remain
silent!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Grrrr! So it's like that, is it? If that's the case, I'm
not leaving your side until you fess up!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh, I wonder which of you will break first.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whistle, whistle. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Spe, you're getting pretty good at whistling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like they're still at it. So long as they're
having fun, I see no problem.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Sometimes, you just have to dive in!
Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pshaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, bingo!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, just as expected, King. You make the
most delicious choices.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I don't find anything about this "delicious"!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, looks like I've incurred the king's wrath!
Time to skedaddle!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Graaah! Get back here, Sky! It's your turn next!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo and Special Week run off after Seiun
Sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm just glad they're having fun.
